summary: Tested multi-project tab system POLISH pass. All 14 features verified. Tab bar styling improvements confirmed: LayoutGrid icon on Project Bin, stronger active tab glow (shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,229,255,0.10)]), scrollable tab container, '+' button at far right, consistent h-7 height, truncate class for long names.

features_tested.feature: Tab bar always visible with Project Bin as permanent leftmost tab
Project Bin tab shows grid icon (LayoutGrid) next to label
features_tested.details: SVG with classes 'lucide lucide-layout-grid w-3 h-3'

features_tested.feature: Project Bin tab cannot be closed (no close button)
Active tab has stronger glow/shadow than before
Inactive tabs have lower contrast than active tab
'+' button visible at far right of tab bar
'+' button opens Project Bin when clicked
Clicking a project tile still adds a tab (no regression)
Tabs persist when switching to Project Bin (no regression)
Closing active tab switches to nearest remaining tab (no regression)
Closing last tab returns to Project Bin (no regression)
Long project names are truncated with ellipsis
features_tested.details: truncate class + max-w-[180px] on tab container

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-project tab system POLISH pass fully tested. Key improvements from iteration_37: LayoutGrid icon added to Project Bin tab, stronger active tab glow (shadow-[0_0_10px]), scrollable tab container with hidden scrollbar, '+' button at far right (data-testid='tabs-add-btn'), consistent h-7 height on all tabs, truncate class for long names (max-w-[180px]). All regression tests passed - tabs persist, switching works, closing behavior correct.
